title: The Joy of Missing Out
author: Anneli Rufus
subline: Finding balance in a world of too much.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A field of tiny squares (events / activities), all faded. ONE is missing — leaving a blank. That blank is the joy. The single red square is a different KIND of event: the one worth attending. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)">
    <!-- 10x6 grid of small squares, 40px each, 12 gap. Centered around 0,0. So 10 columns from -300 to 240, 6 rows from -120 to 120. Skip the center. -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">
      <!-- Row 1 -->
      <rect x="-300" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-248" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-196" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-144" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-92" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-40" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="12" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="64" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="116" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="168" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="220" y="-120" width="40" height="40"/>
      <!-- Row 2 -->
      <rect x="-300" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-248" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-196" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-144" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-92" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-40" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="12" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="64" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="116" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="168" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="220" y="-68" width="40" height="40"/>
      <!-- Row 3 — leave center blank -->
      <rect x="-300" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-248" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-196" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-144" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-92" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-40" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="12" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="64" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="116" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="168" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="220" y="-16" width="40" height="40"/>
      <!-- Row 4 — leave center blank -->
      <rect x="-300" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-248" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-196" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-144" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-92" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-40" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="12" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="64" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="116" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="168" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="220" y="36" width="40" height="40"/>
      <!-- Row 5 -->
      <rect x="-300" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-248" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-196" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-144" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-92" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="-40" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="12" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="64" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="116" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="168" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
      <rect x="220" y="88" width="40" height="40"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Empty center — the JOMO. Just a thin border. -->
    <rect x="-12" y="20" width="120" height="80" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 4"/>
    <text x="48" y="68" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#cccccc">JOMO</text>
    <!-- The single RED square somewhere off-center: the thing you DID choose -->
    <rect x="-300" y="-16" width="40" height="40" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A grid of 60 small squares representing events/opportunities. One is red (the one you chose), and at the center a blank outlined square marked JOMO is the joy of missing. The book made visible: 60 things happening, 58 you don't go to, 1 you do, and the absence is the point.
